LanguageData.Doxa.leaderDescription:
Doxa-0 is an autonomous tactical fire control hub modeled after large arachnid organisms. As a key unit among mechanoids, it possesses multiple tactical functions including area suppression, target designation, and summoning support.
Doxa-0 moves slowly, typically advancing across terrain at low frequency. When entering its "Artillery Lock" state, the main body becomes fully automated and stationary, activating its rocket artillery module mounted on the third dorsal segment to deliver high-coverage, shield-penetrating strikes.
Additionally, Doxa-0 features self-defense mechanisms: during combat, it periodically incubates and releases "Shellsplitter" units - fast, fragile but highly dangerous small support mechanoids. Shellsplitters release localized shockwaves and EMP disruption pulses upon death, dealing area damage to targets and impairing their electronic capabilities.
Its massive neural core system grants it powerful target calculation and fire control coordination capabilities. If its deployment activities are not quickly interrupted, it may completely dominate the battle rhythm through overwhelming suppression.
